source_description: Close #1501. After Bucket 3 of Phase 3 dead-code cleanup, 31 baseline entries remain for three traits whose class-level docblock carries @api: RevisionableEntityTrait (17 property-never-read), InteractsWithApi (9), RefreshDatabase (5). Other @api-carrying traits DO drop from the baseline, proving the mechanism works in general. The hole is specifically in how class-level @api propagates to trait members — neither shipmonk's ApiPhpDocUsageProvider nor WaaseyaaEntrypointProvider's hasApiPhpDoc handles the trait-member case. The fix audits the propagation logic, extends it, and drops these 31 entries.
